title: centaurea collicola
intro: Centaurea collicola, also known as the rare or endangered mountain cornflower, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Centaurea collicola include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a potential treatment for various ailments. While its herbal preparations are not well-documented, it is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
